text.title: A11y Screen Status Tracker Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply A11y Screen Status Tracker end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where relevant) a decision-gate.

step.name: inventory-screens
step.action: Enumerate distinct screens or flows from design system or product map.

step.name: map-audit-findings
step.action: Assign each finding to its screen row; tag blocking SC list.

step.name: assign-owners-and-dates
step.action: Set owner + last_tested per row; flag rows >90 days as stale.
step.decision-gate: If any row has 'team'/'we' owner, STOP and rewrite.

step.name: link-remediation
step.action: For partial/fail rows, file an issue (or link existing) and store URL.
step.decision-gate: If any non-pass row lacks remediation_url, BLOCK publish.

step.name: validate-and-publish
step.action: Run `scripts/validate-a11y-screen-status-tracker.py`; publish to audit channel; update dashboard.
